text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Thank you for treating me, Maruzen.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
No problemo! Think of it as payback for<n>going for
a drive with me! ☆

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Sooo, how've things been since?<n>Everything chill?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, yes. The irritation I felt up until<n>now has
been blown away, carried off by<n>the wind.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...You know, I've thought this before,<n>but you and
I are really similar.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Which is why... you should come to me<n>when
you're troubled. We'll go for a<n>drive and blow
your problems away! ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I don't want everything to be about me<n>every
time, so how about I invite you to<n>tea next time?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I getcha! Sounds groovy to me, baby! I'll<n>drink
your tea any day of the week. ☆
